headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 17, 2026**
article:
The Toronto Blue Jays secured a thrilling 2-1 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with Yohendrick Piñango leading the Blue Jays' offense. In other games, the St. Louis Cardinals took down the Kansas City Royals 4-2, the Colorado Rockies defeated the Arizona Diamondbacks 4-2, the Washington Nationals were routed by the Baltimore Orioles 13-3, and the Tampa Bay Rays secured a 6-3 win over the Miami Marlins.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Brendan Donovan (Seattle Mariners) who was placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left groin muscle strain. Other injured players include Jack Dreyer (Los Angeles Dodgers), Hunter Harvey (Chicago Cubs), Ty Madden (Detroit Tigers), Ryan O'Hearn (Pittsburgh Pirates), Jose Trevino (Cincinnati Reds), Tommy Nance (Toronto Blue Jays), and Jake Fraley (Tampa Bay Rays).

The Los Angeles Dodgers acquired Eric Lauer from the Toronto Blue Jays in a trade for cash. The Chicago White Sox received Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for Jackson Nove, while the Athletics traded Kyle Robinson to the Pittsburgh Pirates for Alika Williams. The Athletics also traded Eduarniel Núñez to the Baltimore Orioles for cash.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Edge Tigers in Thrilling 2-1 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays secured a narrow win over the Detroit Tigers, with a final score of 2-1. Yohendrick Piñango led the Blue Jays' offense with a strong performance, recording 2 hits, including a home run, and 1 RBI.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Royals 4-2**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 4-2 victory over the Kansas City Royals, with Kyle Leahy earning the win after 6.0 innings of work. Jac Caglianone led the Royals' offense with 2 hits, including a 5th home run of the season.

top_news.title: **Rockies Take Down Diamondbacks 4-2**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies secured a 4-2 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks, with Tomoyuki Sugano earning the win and Antonio Senzatela securing the save. Mickey Moniak led the Diamondbacks with 2 RBI, while Eduardo Rodriguez pitched 5.1 innings with 6 strikeouts.

top_news.title: **Nationals Rout Orioles 13-3**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals dominated the Baltimore Orioles, securing a 13-3 victory. Keibert Ruiz led the Nationals' offense with a 3-hit, 5-RBI performance, including a home run.

top_news.title: **Rays Take Down Marlins 6-3**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a 3-6 victory over the Miami Marlins, with several players making an impact on the game. Xavier Edwards, Otto Lopez, and Yandy Díaz were among the notable performers for the Marlins, while Jake Fraley contributed to the Rays' win.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Nationals 7-3**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a 7-3 victory over the Washington Nationals, with multiple players contributing to the win. Gunnar Henderson, Coby Mayo, Colton Cowser, Jeremiah Jackson, James Wood, Luis García Jr., and Jacob Young were among the impact hitters for the Orioles.

top_news.title: **Mariners Place Donovan on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Seattle Mariners third baseman Brendan Donovan has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left groin muscle strain, effective retroactive to May 16, 2026.

top_news.title: **Lauer Joins Dodgers in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays traded left-handed pitcher Eric Lauer to the Los Angeles Dodgers for cash. Lauer will now join the Dodgers' roster.
